chapter_title.ar: باب طَعَامِ أَهْلِ الذِّمَّةِ وَ مُؤَاكَلَتِهِمْ وَ آنِيَتِهِمْ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 16 – Food of the Ahl Al-Zimma (People under the responsibility), and their meals and their vessels

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/62)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/62)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) إِنِّي أُخَالِطُ الْمَجُوسِيَّ فَآكُلُ مِنْ طَعَامِهِمْ فَقَالَ لَا .

en.hubeali: From him, from Ismail Bin Mihran, from Muhammad Bin Ziyad, from Haroun Bin Jariya who said,
‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘I intermingle with the Magians, so I eat from their meals’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘No’.
en.sarwar: 8. It is narrated from the narrator of the previous Hadith from ’Isma‘il ibn Mehran from Muhammad ibn Ziyad from Harun ibn Kharijah who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, Alayhi al-Salam, if I can associate with Zoroastrians and eat from their food. He (the Imam) said, ‘No.’”
